item.title: Abs and more
item.dc:creator: SeaSpace

item.title: The 94th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dump
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild each Mon - Thu between 11am and Noon EST, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's new "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
No, I don't actually call them MeeMays, OR DO I?!?!
Ken M is a National Treasure
#Dump #Meme_Dump #Phone_Dump #AncientMemes #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #EatingAppsTakingNaps #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #EatNamesAndTakeAss #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #HitlerAteBigBagsOfDicks #IfYoureDeadInside #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten (DK Dump) @CodyBurkett (Pippin) @AbbiiStabbii (Images Of Note) @DigiT00l @DumpsterKoala @OhValleyOfPlenty @CeleryMan7 Vol. 1 https://imgur.com/gallery/MKoxsC0 Vol. 2 https://imgur.com/gallery/LuT8Tjh Vol. 3 https://imgur.com/gallery/DwYKbXW Vol. 4 https://imgur.com/gallery/hAKeS7B Vol. 5 https://imgur.com/gallery/sn3GPn1 Vol. 6 https://imgur.com/gallery/X14rMhq Vol. 7 https://imgur.com/gallery/8TycbEB Vol. 8 https://imgur.com/gallery/DUpO8AW Vol. 9 https://imgur.com/gallery/KJJgDnc Vol 10 https://imgur.com/gallery/6nAbX3Z Vol 11 https://imgur.com/gallery/HQcMJFS - Food Vol 12 https://imgur.com/gallery/2MGl5x9 - Dinos and Bears Vol 13 https://imgur.com/gallery/oT6pcnU - Therapy Vol 14 https://imgur.com/gallery/YgRk6Es - BMD (Big Mood Disorder) Vol 15 https://imgur.com/gallery/qiK2WtQ - MATURE Vol 16 https://imgur.com/gallery/p51V73n Vol 17 https://imgur.com/gallery/U1zD3DK Vol 18 https://imgur.com/gallery/k7heWWP Vol 19 https://imgur.com/gallery/H9apiBi Vol 20 https://imgur.com/gallery/amPEj5N Vol 21 https://imgur.com/gallery/56sAniX Vol 22 https://imgur.com/gallery/TMQHwkY Vol 23 https://imgur.com/gallery/BCWxyxy Vol 24 https://imgur.com/gallery/C23H9gk Vol 25 https://imgur.com/gallery/rWRckHP Vol 26 https://imgur.com/gallery/hJYgHKM Vol 27 https://imgur.com/gallery/TE5h7Kc Vol 28 https://imgur.com/gallery/0KQqqQ9 Vol 29 https://imgur.com/gallery/wsxJ2x4 Vol 30 https://imgur.com/gallery/NuOQleO - 2020 Vol 31 https://imgur.com/gallery/mckkQL7 - "The CoVids" Vol 32 https://imgur.com/gallery/AGnauzI - "Children Are The Future" 1 Vol 33 https://imgur.com/gallery/3hb0dGz - "Children Are The Future" 2 Vol 34 https://imgur.com/gallery/fBjdJmu - Trash Panda and Opossum Edition! Vol 35 https://imgur.com/gallery/BTg5R0M - DOGS!!! Edition # 1 Vol 36 https://imgur.com/gallery/tT9noOF - DOGS!!! Edition # 2 Vol 37 https://imgur.com/gallery/oF4vDPu - DOGS!!! Edition # 3 - GIFS! v. I Vol 38 https://imgur.com/gallery/mDkP3ha - DOGS!!! Edition # 4 - GIFS! v. II Vol 39 https://imgur.com/gallery/FXtWgoK - DOGS!!! Edition # 5 - SOUND! Vol 40 https://imgur.com/gallery/Z6lUbmg - BIRBS! - Pics and Gifs! Vol 41 https://imgur.com/gallery/o3WinX1 - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." Edition # 1 Vol 42 https://imgur.com/gallery/9nhzYSv - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." Edition # 2 Vol 43 https://imgur.com/gallery/6PNvIPz - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." Edition # 3 - MATURE Vol 44 https://imgur.com/gallery/EuLljf1 - Parenting 1 Vol 45 https://imgur.com/gallery/t1xLBpq - Parenting 2 - FATHER'S DAY EDITION!!! Vol 46 https://imgur.com/gallery/pxqktSE - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. I Vol 47 https://imgur.com/gallery/7EDmSN7 - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. II Vol 48 https://imgur.com/gallery/P9srHhp Vol 49 https://imgur.com/gallery/BUv6qOC Vol 50 https://imgur.com/gallery/k67M01G Vol 51 https://imgur.com/gallery/nXUSEtU Vol 52 https://imgur.com/gallery/ySPYez7 Vol 53 https://imgur.com/gallery/LSplkEf Vol 54 https://imgur.com/gallery/sI6JnEV Vol 55 https://imgur.com/gallery/ChYA12H Vol 56 https://imgur.com/gallery/G5dE3Om Vol 57 https://imgur.com/gallery/yRvJuRE Vol 58 https://imgur.com/gallery/rLK5Y1q Vol 59 https://imgur.com/a/iELzZ66 -Removed from gallery for one "offensive" image Vol 60 https://imgur.com/gallery/kCMzVTP - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v. Vol 66 https://imgur.com/gallery/sl4sRV7 Vol 67 https://imgur.com/gallery/DR4LbNI Vol 68 https://imgur.com/gallery/H4ipoO9 - D&Dump - Image Edition Vol 69 https://imgur.com/gallery/WhH54f2 - D&Dump - Reading Edition Vol 70 https://imgur.com/gallery/pAoobS6 Vol 71 https://imgur.com/gallery/zmZF53H Vol 72 https://imgur.com/gallery/StUTVA7 Vol 73 https://imgur.com/gallery/ZXblzC0 Vol 74 https://imgur.com/gallery/1rWvTNc Vol 75 https://imgur.com/gallery/EaMatw6 Vol 76 https://imgur.com/gallery/DB7XXis Vol 77 https://imgur.com/gallery/P76BUQW Vol 78 https://imgur.com/gallery/GpUx9JD Vol 79 https://imgur.com/gallery/KEfEp2k Vol 80 https://imgur.com/gallery/MMkm8Fq Vol 81 https://imgur.com/gallery/rFCfCH9 Vol 82 https://imgur.com/gallery/EFIGQGf Vol 83 https://imgur.com/gallery/2sJkh1h Vol 84 https://imgur.com/gallery/hunUWUD Vol 85 https://imgur.com/gallery/G96GtGQ Vol 86 https://imgur.com/gallery/ihADXqJ Vol 87 https://imgur.com/gallery/iTlb6z7 Vol 88 https://imgur.com/gallery/4XXmRVg Vol 89 https://imgur.com/gallery/cX2uRd2 - FROG EDITION v. I Vol 90 https://imgur.com/gallery/nVppX8R - FROG EDITION v. II Vol 91 https://imgur.com/gallery/bQE1BJC - FROG EDITION v. W(ednesday) Vol 92 https://imgur.com/gallery/vTa4OfV - Water-Boi Edition v. I - Turts and Torts and Other Sorts Vol 93 https://imgur.com/gallery/NI7VUch OOOOOOF! This list is getting long as AF f•ck to TBH honest --- After this Dump I'll start cutting the link list down to the last 50ish Dumperoos.

item.title: White Privilege Strikes Again **CW: Sexual Assault**
item.description: Rapist Bowen Turner was out on bond for rape when he raped another young woman. Then Bowen Turner, the rapist, violated his bond from his second rape by going to restaurants, friend’s houses, and to the golf course 19 times. Nothing was done to rapist Bowen Turner for violating his bond. Then, the bow tie wearing smashed pastry looking motherfucker of a judge sentenced him to PROBATION for rape and he won’t have to register as the sex offender he is as long as he doesn’t violate his parole. Call me pessimistic, but I don’t think that holds much water since he was let off the hook — repeatedly — when he violated his bond. Oh, and his first {known} victim, Dallas Stoller, passed away last November so they just… dismissed that case since she wouldn’t be able to testify. The United States legal system is working exactly how it’s supposed to be and it’s FUCKED. As long as you’re a rich, popular, white male with a family reputation (and apparently the name B. Turner), then you are above the law. Article: https://thetandd.com/news/local/crime-and-courts/man-19-guilty-in-assault-probation-sentence-leads-parents-to-question-justice/article_657ac3d4-0aa3-52db-9630-2dcc1aa3bf90.html
item.dc:creator: Cravanicus

Sounds exactly like like something someone with a wife in the trunk would say...
Looks... painful
Definitely
Happy Tuesday guys!

item.title: A valid question ...

item.title: 15 year old Nazi fired
item.description:
This kid ruined his career already
Edit: kid lost his racing license and more to come potentially https://www.motorsport.com/kart/news/russian-karter-loses-racing-licence-nazi-salute/9837571/ "During the extraordinary meeting of the Sports Council of the Automobile Club of Italy - convened to take urgent measures following the unspeakable and unacceptable gesture of the Russian kart driver Artem Severiukhin, on the podium of the European junior kart race in Portimao - is still in progress, we learn that the Board itself has decided the immediate withdrawal of Severiukhin's sports license and has, at the same time, referred him to the Sports Justice so that it can evaluate the definition of further sanctions that fall within its own sphere of competence," the Italian body said in a statement. "Severiukhin has shown a lack of respect not only for the universal values that have always inspired every sport, but also for humanity, dignity and civil coexistence."

item.title: Day 319: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: C- Roll Chili Cheese Burger Two 4oz Beef Smash Patties, Pimento Cheese, Diced Onions, Cooper’s Chili, Stacked On A Cinnamon Roll Bun With Homemade Icing From Lucy Cooper's Texas Ice House In San Antonio, Texas Thank You @sarabear For This Crazy Burger Submission 10/10 Previous Day 318: https://imgur.com/gallery/IGQR4uZ MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD @CrisprCAS Daily Tag It's A Midwest Thing
